plugins.name: Branch writing
plugins.description: Write your ideas in pieces and organize them in a tree. Edit side-by-side with keyboard shortcuts.

plugins.name: BackTrack
plugins.description: Keeps older versions of your notes so you can rewrite freely. Save once and look back anytime.

plugins.name: Nested Notes
plugins.description: An improved method to organize notes that doesn't rely on folders but has all the benefits that folders offer without their downsides.

plugins.name: Obsidian Plugin Creator
plugins.description: Start a plugin project from the official sample template, set up a clean structure, and jump straight to the files where the real work starts.

themes.name: Royal lux
themes.description: Dark mode theme with a dark purple style.
themes.unlockHint: Available after purchase — share feedback to unlock install.
